titleStmt.title: SII 23.275: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 275. (A.R. No. 275 of 1907.) Tiruviḍaimarudūr, Kumbhakonam Taluk, Tanjavur District Mahāliṅgasvāmi temple—on the north base of the same maṇḍapa Vikrama-Chōḷa: year 9: 1125-26 A.D.

summary.p: This registers an endowment of six vēli of land in three separate plots at Vikramaśōḻanallūr, made by the king, to meet the expenses of worship to god Vikramaśōḻīśvaram-Uḍaiyār newly consecrated by him in the temple. The rent from these tax free dēvadāna lands is said to be 345 kalam of paddy, as settled in the revenue survey conducted in the 38th year (of the king's predecessor).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pūmātu puṇarap puvimātu vaḷara nāmātu viḷaṅka jayamātu nilavat taṉṉirupatamalar maṉṉavar cūṭa maṉṉiya Urimaiyāl maṇimuṭi cūṭic ceṅkol ceṉṟu ticaitoṟum vaḷarppa veṅkali niṅki mey yaṟan taḻaippak kaliṅka miriyak kaṭalmalai naṭātti valaṅkoḷāḻi varaiyāḻi naṭappa Irucuṭaraḷavum Orukuṭai niḻaṟkiḻ virasimhāsa nattu mu
kkokkiḻānaṭikaḷoṭu viṟṟiruntaruḷiya kopparakesaripatmarāna tribhuvanacakrarttikaḷ śrīvikkiramacoḻatevaṟkku yāṇṭu Oṉpatā vatu Uyyakkoṇṭār vaḷanāṭṭut tiraimūrnāṭṭu Uṭaiyār tiru viṭaimarutuṭaiyār śrīkoyilil Eḻuntaruḷivitta vikkiramacoḻa Īśvaramuṭaiyārkku veṇṭum nimantaṅkaḷukku Iṟuppatākap paḻa
mper tavirttu yāṇṭu Oṉpatāvatumutal tevatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyāy vikkiramacoḻanallūreṉṟu tirunāmattāl Orūrāyk kūṭina Uy yakkoṇṭārvaḷanāṭṭut tiraimūrnāṭṭu maturāntakanallūrāṉa Arintavaṉ cāttamaṅkalam jinattaraiyarum neṟkuppaiuṭaiyārkkum kāṇiyāṉa nilam nikki nilam 2nta�kīn=tanilam I
raṇṭe mukkāle Araikkāṇi muntirikaikciḻ mukkāliṉāl nellu nūṟṟaṟupattaṟukalaneaiṅkuṟuṇi Eḻunāḻiyināl niccayitta nellu nūṟṟaṟupattaiṅkalane tūṇi Aṟunāḻikku muppatteṭṭāvatu nicca yitta nellu nūṟṟaimpattirukalane kuṟuṇiyum Iṉṉāṭṭu net toṟppaṭṭikai Iṟaiyili māṟina Enātimaṅkalattukkuḷ neṟ
kuppaiuṭaiyāṉ kāṇiyāna nilam nikki nilam Iraṇṭemukkālināl nellu nūṟṟeṇpattirukalane kuṟuṇi Irunāḻi Urikku niccayitta nellu nūṟṟaṟupattu mukkalaṉe patakkum Innāṭṭu nettoṟpaṭ ṭikai Iṟaiyili Enātimaṅkalattukkaḷil tiruvulakaḷanteṟina nilamāyt tiṟappāna nilattu Orupakkamaṭaiya Iṭṭa nilam Oṉpatumāmukkā
ṇikkiḻk kāliṉāl nellu muppattirukalane patakkaññāḻi Urikku niccayitta nellu Irupattoṉpatiṉ kalane Irutūṇippatakku Eḻu nāḻiyum Āka vikkiramacoḻanallūr nilam Aṟuveliyināl nellu muṉṉūṟṟaimpatteṇkalane tūṇi Iru nāḻi Urikku muppatteṭ ṭāvatu niccayitta nilattāl nellu nūṟṟaimpattirukalane kuṟu ṇikku niccayit
tilāta nilattāl muṉpu niccayitta nellu nūṟṟut toṇṇūṟṟiru kalane Irutūṇi mukkuṟuṇi nānāḻiyum Āka nellu muṉṉūṟṟu nāṟpattaiṅkalane nānāḻiyum yāṇṭu Oṉpatāvatumutal tevatāṉa Iṟaiyil Iṭṭamaikku Ivai purovari tiṇaikkaḷa nāyakam Ulaka veḷā neḻuttu Ivai purovari tiṇaikkaḷattu mukaveṭṭi mukanta nūruṭaiyā neḻuttu Ivai purovari tiṇaikka
ḷattu mukaveṭṭi pācālikiḻavaneḻuttu Ivai purovari tiṇaik kaḷattu mukaveṭṭi ciṟukuṭaiyā neḻuttu Ivai purovari tiṇaikkaḷa nāyakam nākaṅkoṟṟa neḻuttu Ivai purovari tiṇaikkaḷattu muka veṭṭi nākamaṅ tu Ivai purovari tiṇaikkaḷa nāyakam nelmali kiḻā neḻuttu Ivai purovari tiṇaikkaḷa nāyakam ciṟukuṉṟaṅkiḻā neḻuttu Ivai varakuṇarāya neḻuttu
Ivai viracoḻap pallavaraiya neḻuttu Itu śrīmāheśvarakṣai .
tevatāṉa Iṟaiyili yiṭṭapaṭikkum kūṭinapaṭikkum Uḷvari kalveṭṭu
Digital edition of SII 23.275 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
